scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.gate:pre-push: pnpm run test:tracked-secret-exposure && pnpm run test:database-safety && pnpm run build
scripts.build: pnpm run check:tracked-secret-exposure && pnpm run check:database-safety && pnpm run check:mojibake && pnpm run check:living-brief && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
